CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Howard Auerbach, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Anixter, Inc., a corporation.
Melissa Kobus, credit manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Centennial Distributors, Inc., a corporation, Carlos Quiroz or Jean Quiroz.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 29, 2009.
Doe defendnts were dismissed on September 29, 2009.

Exhibit--1--Invoice from Anixter, Inc., a corporation, dated 8/7/08-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--2--Invoice from Anixter, Inc., a corporation, dated 8/11/08------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--3--Credit Application, dated 10/6/06-----------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--4--Credit Application, undated-----------------------------------------------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Anixter, Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Centenial Distributors, Inc., a corporation, Carlos Quiroz and Jean Quiroz as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43,966.65.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,845.44.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,092.09.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
